title: aspidium parasiticum
intro: Aspidium parasiticum, also known as the Autumn fern or Polypodium vulgare var. aspidium, is a type of fern that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aspidium parasiticum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing the risk of certain diseases. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used as a powder in herbal supplements.
